title: Welcome to the Jesus Words Project

sections.heading: About This Project
sections.text: This collection focuses on the direct words of Jesus Christ as recorded in the Gospels. Here you can explore His teachings, parables, and sayings in an organized and searchable format.

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.text: Navigate through the tabs above to explore different categories of Jesus' teachings. Use the search function to find specific words or phrases. Toggle dark mode and accessibility options as needed.

sections.heading: Scripture Focus
sections.text: All content is drawn from the canonical Gospels of Matthew, Mark, Luke, and John, with emphasis on the red letter words - the direct quotes attributed to Jesus.
